name: Automotive Holdings Group Limited
description: Automotive Holdings Group Limited (AHG) was an Australian automotive retail and logistics company. It operated a large network of automotive dealerships across Australia and New Zealand, representing numerous passenger and commercial vehicle brands. Additionally, the company provided cold chain logistics and transport services. In 2019, Automotive Holdings Group was acquired by Eagers Automotive Limited (formerly A.P. Eagers Limited), creating Australia's largest automotive retail group.
